title: rubus × kalaidae
intro: Rubus × kalaidae is a hybrid species of the genus Rubus, specifically a cross between Rubus arcticus and Rubus chamaemorus. It is also known as the Arctic raspberry or the Mountain raspberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus × kalaidae include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may be attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × kalaidae include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant protection, and it can be prepared as a tea, jam, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements.
